opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach inflated like a balloon right after dinner, the cramps are unbearable, and I feel like I'm going to pass out on the toilet.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It hit within half an hour of eating and I'm losing so much fluid — I feel faint and I'm scared.

symptom_narrative.character: agonising cramps, huge bloating/distension, then explosive diarrhoea, with flushing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: cramps 9-10/10 and I feel like I'll pass out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my belly, very distended
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: post-food onset, pain peaks then eases a bit after passing motions
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: passing a motion eases the pain briefly
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: eating, and standing up makes me feel faint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: flushing, drenching sweats, a sense of impending doom, and near-fainting on the toilet
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have suspected MCAS and get gut flares but this is a severe one

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: suspected MCAS with food reactions and bowel problems

allergies_as_reported.reaction_described: cramps, diarrhoea, flushing after certain foods

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing specific that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and I'm worried I'll collapse getting up

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened, describing severe cramps, fluid loss and faintness

objective_data_offered.value: my belly is hugely bloated and I've had explosive watery diarrhoea; I'm flushed and sweaty
I feel faint and dizzy when I try to stand
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: symptom of possible dehydration/hypotension; BP cannot be measured over chat

objective_data_offered.value: my pulse feels racing, around 110 on my watch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home wearable; consistent with fluid loss/histamine
